title: Daily Triage Roadmap Activation Chain
description: Design and dogfood the Plan Signal to Roadmap-Sliced Development activation path.

1.label: Daily Triage Roadmap Activation Chain

decisions.answer: Commit current implementation as feat: enable roadmap activation dispatch dogfood.
decisions.note: This is the feature slice commit; closeout consolidation/deletion must be a separate commit.

1.notes: Verification evidence before feature-slice commit: npm run test:activation-contract passed; npm run test:issue-fix-request passed; git diff --check passed; bash scripts/ci-audit-gates.sh passed; bash scripts/ci-validate-gates.sh passed after network-enabled retry. Real dogfood carrier #19 captured slash command, Route Decision, activation request, activation consumed, and closeout comment.

1-1.label: Chain terminology and ownership boundaries

decisions.q: 链路表述是否需要调整？
decisions.answer: 需要。推荐 canonical chain 使用：Plan Signal -> Route Decision -> Activation Request -> Roadmap-Sliced Consumer -> Roadmap Branch/PR；本项目 dogfood 可写成 Daily Triage Signal -> Route Decision -> Activation Request -> Roadmap-Sliced Development -> Roadmap Branch/PR。
decisions.note: 避免暗示 Daily Triage 直接启动实现；Daily Triage 是 producer，Route Dispatcher 创建 request，Roadmap-Sliced Development 消费 activation。

decisions.q: Human 是否确认 canonical chain 表述？
decisions.answer: 确认采用 Plan Signal -> Route Decision -> Activation Request -> Roadmap-Sliced Consumer -> Roadmap Branch/PR；本项目 dogfood 使用 Daily Triage Signal -> Route Decision -> Activation Request -> Roadmap-Sliced Development -> Roadmap Branch/PR。
decisions.note: Daily Triage 只是 producer；Route Dispatcher 才创建 activation request。

1-1.notes: Canonical chain wording confirmed; ownership boundary fixed between Daily Triage producer, Route Dispatcher, and Roadmap-Sliced consumer.

1-2.label: End-to-end activation implementation design

decisions.q: 是否启用 route table 中的 Roadmap activation route？
decisions.answer: 确认启用。将 roadmap-sliced-development 从 disabled_dispatch_routes 提升为正式 routes，request_kind 保持 activation-comment，consumer 保持 roadmap-sliced-development。
decisions.note: Daily Triage 只产出 Plan Signal 或推荐命令；Route Dispatcher 创建 append-only Activation Request comment；Roadmap-Sliced Development 消费显式 issue/request id 后负责 branch、roadmap、PR handoff。

decisions.q: Activation replay 是否必须读取真实 route table？
decisions.answer: 确认必须。将 activation replay 从内置模拟 Route Decision 升级为读取 zj-loop/zj-loop-route-table.yaml 并生成 Route Decision。
decisions.note: 只有 route enabled、request_kind=activation-comment、consumer=roadmap-sliced-development 时才允许创建 activation request；配置错误必须让 replay/test 失败。

1-2.notes: Decide how to make route-table dispatch executable without letting Daily Triage perform roadmap implementation work.

1-3.label: Replayable verification and diagnosis design

decisions.q: 问题定位回放如何验证？
decisions.answer: 通过 node scripts/roadmap-activation-e2e-replay.mjs 和 node --test scripts/roadmap-activation-e2e-replay.test.mjs scripts/roadmap-activation-dispatcher.test.mjs 验证。Replay 必须读取真实 route table，并覆盖 created、denied、duplicate、route-disabled 分支。
decisions.note: Route Decision evidence 也必须能作为 issue comment 独立回放，不与 activation lifecycle comment 混在一起。

1-3.notes: Replay/test gate reads the dogfood route table and covers activation-created, denied, duplicate, and route-disabled diagnosis branches.

1-4.label: ZAgenticLoop dogfood implementation

decisions.q: 真实 dogfood 使用什么载体？
decisions.answer: 确认使用独立 synthetic GitHub issue 作为载体。
decisions.note: 通过 issue comment 承载 /zj-loop start roadmap-sliced-development、activation-request、activation-consumed 等 append-only evidence；完成后关闭 synthetic issue 并把证据写回 durable testing/dogfood docs。

1-4.notes: Completed synthetic GitHub issue dogfood in #19: slash command, route decision, activation request, activation consumed, and issue closeout captured as append-only evidence.

1-2-1.label: Route-table-backed activation route decision
1-2-1.notes: Route-table-backed activation route decision implemented in scripts/roadmap-activation-e2e-replay.mjs and covered by route-enabled/route-disabled tests.

1-2-2.label: Activation dispatcher boundary and comment creation
1-2-2.notes: Added scripts/roadmap-activation-dispatcher.mjs to produce route decisions and append-only activation lifecycle comments without performing consumer work.

1-2-3.label: Roadmap-Sliced consumer handoff contract
1-2-3.notes: Dogfood consumed request rsd-19-dogfood with handoff anchors: branch codex-daily-triage-roadmap-activation, roadmap JSON, roadmap MD view, and next action.
